title: Judgment Detox
author: Gabrielle Bernstein
subline: Release the judgments that hold you back.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A thought bubble. Inside the bubble, a 'judging eye' (eyeball with a tiny red pupil). The bubble is being WRAPPED in a purifying cross — a horizontal red line and a vertical red line forming a + (the detox). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Thought bubble: an irregular cloud shape -->
    <path d="M -360 0 Q -380 -100 -300 -160 Q -260 -240 -140 -220 Q -60 -280 60 -240 Q 180 -260 240 -160 Q 340 -120 320 0 Q 360 80 280 160 Q 220 240 100 220 Q 20 280 -80 240 Q -200 260 -280 180 Q -380 140 -360 0 Z" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- The eye inside -->
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="120" ry="60" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="38" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- The detox cross: a red + sign that overlays the thought bubble -->
    <line x1="-500" y1="0" x2="500" y2="0" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="-400" x2="0" y2="400" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">RELEASE THE JUDGMENT · KEEP THE LESSON</text>
</svg>
rationale: An ash thought-bubble cloud containing a single judging eye (ellipse + small red pupil). Over the entire bubble, a red 3px cross — a + sign — runs horizontally and vertically, framing the eye. The cross IS the detox: a + to neutralize the -. Title 320px mixed case, two lines, weight 300.
